name: FoodHub
description: FoodHub is a full-stack meal ordering platform with role-based access for Customer, Provider, and Admin. Customers can browse meals, add to cart, place Cash on Delivery orders, track orders, and leave reviews. Providers can manage their menus and orders, while Admins can oversee users and platform activities. Built with modern technologies and a fully responsive design.
challenges: Implement role-based authentication and authorization for three different user roles
Manage complex order flow states (PLACED → PREPARING → READY → DELIVERED → CANCELLED)
Build separate dashboards for Customer, Provider, and Admin with different permissions
Handle real-time order status updates across different user roles
improvements: Implement delivery tracking with map integration
Add advanced filtering and search with better UX

name: ScholarshipHub
description: ScholarshipHub is a comprehensive Scholarship Management System designed to assist students in searching for suitable universities and scholarships. It also facilitates the application process, allowing students to apply for scholarships directly through the platform. The system supports three types of users: default users, administrators, and moderators. Upon registration, a user is assigned the 'user' role by default. Administrators have the capability to change user roles as needed.
challenges: Make a pagination in all Scholarship pages
Implement sorting/filtering function in Manage Applied Application in moderator and admin Dashboard.
Implement an analytics Chart page in the Admin dashboard

name: Artifact Atlas
description: Artifact Atlas is an interactive web platform for exploring and managing historical artifacts.
challenges: Toggle Like Button The Like Button allows users to toggle between Liked and Disliked states.
Search Functionality On the top of the All Artifacts Page
improvements: Add a spinner when the data is in a loading state.
